query:
SELECT 
  cd.id, cd.userId, cd.type, cd.visibleCVtheque, cd.actif,
  u.name as userName, u.email,
  cp.prenom, cp.nom, cp.ville
FROM cv_documents cd
LEFT JOIN users u ON cd.userId = u.id
LEFT JOIN candidats cp ON cd.userId = cp.userId
ORDER BY cd.createdAt DESC;
